file.content:
name: Continuous integration
on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true
jobs:
  build:
    name: "Build and test on ${{ matrix.os }}"
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: macos-latest
          - os: windows-latest
          - os: ubuntu-latest
      fail-fast: false
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - name: Check out NullAway sources
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Set up JDK 27 EA from jdk.java.net'
        uses: oracle-actions/setup-java@v1
        with:
          website: jdk.java.net
          release: 27
      - name: 'Set up JDKs'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v5
        with:
          java-version: |
            17
            21
            25
          distribution: 'temurin'
          check-latest: 'true'
      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5
      - name: List toolchains
        run: ./gradlew javaToolchains
      - name: Build and test
        run: ./gradlew build
      - name: Run shellcheck
        run: ./gradlew shellcheck
        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
      - name: Aggregate jacoco coverage
        id: jacoco_report
        run: ./gradlew codeCoverageReport
        continue-on-error: true
        if: runner.os == 'Linux' && github.repository == 'uber/NullAway'
      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          files: ./code-coverage-report/build/reports/jacoco/codeCoverageReport/codeCoverageReport.xml
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
        if: steps.jacoco_report.outcome == 'success'
      - name: Cleanup Codecov temporary files
        run: |
          # See https://github.com/codecov/codecov-action/issues/1851
          rm -rf codecov codecov.SHA256SUM codecov.SHA256SUM.sig
        if: steps.jacoco_report.outcome == 'success'        
      - name: Test publishToMavenLocal flow
        env:
          ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_VERSION_NAME: '0.0.0.1-LOCAL'
          ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_RELEASE_SIGNING_ENABLED: 'false'
        run: ./gradlew publishToMavenLocal
      - name: Check that Git tree is clean after build and test
        run: ./.buildscript/check_git_clean.sh
  test-with-error-prone-snapshot:
    name: "Test with Error Prone snapshot"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout this repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Set up Default JDK'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v5
        with:
          java-version: 25
          distribution: 'temurin'
      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5
      - name: Test with Error Prone snapshot
        run: ./gradlew testErrorProneLatestSnapshot
  compile-other-projects:
    name: "Build ${{ matrix.project }} with snapshot"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - project: caffeine
            url: https://github.com/ben-manes/caffeine.git
          - project: spring-framework
            url: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework.git
          - project: junit-framework
            url: https://github.com/junit-team/junit-framework.git
          - project: spring-boot
            url: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot.git
    permissions:
      contents: read
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout this repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Set up JDKs'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v5
        with:
          java-version: 25
          distribution: 'temurin'
      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v5
      - name: Publish to Maven Local
        env:
          ORG_GRADLE_PROJECT_RELEASE_SIGNING_ENABLED: 'false'
        run: ./gradlew publishToMavenLocal
      - name: Create a temporary directory for ${{ matrix.project }}
        run: mkdir -p /tmp/${{ matrix.project }}
      - name: Clone ${{ matrix.project }} repository
        run: git clone --depth 1 ${{ matrix.url }} /tmp/${{ matrix.project }}
      - name: Run ${{ matrix.project }} build
        run: |
          cp .github/workflows/use-snapshot.gradle.kts /tmp/${{ matrix.project }}
          cd /tmp/${{ matrix.project }}
          ./gradlew --init-script use-snapshot.gradle.kts assemble

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/default-java

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    unzip \
    zip \
    bash \
    shellcheck \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install JDK 17, 21, 25 from temurin
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-17-jdk \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install JDK 25 (may need to build or fetch from temurin manually)
RUN mkdir -p /opt/jdk && \
    wget -q https://github.com/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/download/jdk-25.0.1%2B9/OpenJDK25U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_25.0.1_9.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz -C /opt/jdk && \
    rm /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    ln -s /opt/jdk/jdk-25* /opt/jdk/jdk-25

# Install JDK 27 EA from jdk.java.net
RUN mkdir -p /opt/jdk27 && \
    wget -q https://download.java.net/java/early_access/jdk27/1/GPL/openjdk-27-ea+1_linux-x64_bin.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk27.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || \
    wget -q https://jdk.java.net/27 -O /tmp/jdk27page.html && \
    echo "Note: JDK 27 EA download may need adjustment based on availability"

# Set up Java toolchain directories for Gradle
ENV JAVA_17_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_21_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_25_HOME=/opt/jdk/jdk-25
ENV JAVA_27_HOME=/opt/jdk27/jdk-27

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    unzip \
    zip \
    bash \

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-21-jdk-amd64

RUN chmod +x /run.sh

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/default-java

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    unzip \
    zip \
    bash \
    shellcheck \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install JDK 17, 21, 25 from temurin
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-17-jdk \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install JDK 25 (may need to build or fetch from temurin manually)
RUN mkdir -p /opt/jdk && \
    wget -q https://github.com/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/download/jdk-25.0.1%2B9/OpenJDK25U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_25.0.1_9.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz -C /opt/jdk && \
    rm /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && \
    ln -s /opt/jdk/jdk-25* /opt/jdk/jdk-25

# Install JDK 27 EA from jdk.java.net
RUN mkdir -p /opt/jdk27 && \
    wget -q https://download.java.net/java/early_access/jdk27/1/GPL/openjdk-27-ea+1_linux-x64_bin.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk27.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || \
    wget -q https://jdk.java.net/27 -O /tmp/jdk27page.html && \
    echo "Note: JDK 27 EA download may need adjustment based on availability"

# Set up Java toolchain directories for Gradle
ENV JAVA_17_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_21_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_25_HOME=/opt/jdk/jdk-25
ENV JAVA_27_HOME=/opt/jdk27/jdk-27

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    unzip \
    zip \
    bash \
    shellcheck \
    openjdk-17-jdk \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Try to download and install JDK 25 from Adoptium releases
RUN mkdir -p /opt/jdk && \
    (wget -q https://api.github.com/repos/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/latest -O /tmp/releases.json 2>/dev/null && \
    JDK25_URL=$(grep -o 'https://github.com/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/download/[^"]*linux_hotspot[^"]*x64_bin.tar.gz' /tmp/releases.json | head -1) && \
    if [ -n "$JDK25_URL" ]; then wget -q "$JDK25_URL" -O /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz && tar -xzf /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz -C /opt/jdk && rm /tmp/jdk25.tar.gz; fi) || echo "JDK 25 not available"

# Try to download and install JDK 27 EA from jdk.java.net
RUN mkdir -p /opt/jdk27 && \
    (wget -q https://download.java.net/java/early_access/jdk27/1/GPL/openjdk-27-ea+1_linux-x64_bin.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk27.tar.gz 2>/dev/null && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/jdk27.tar.gz -C /opt/jdk27 && rm /tmp/jdk27.tar.gz) || echo "JDK 27 EA not available"

# Set up Java homes
ENV JAVA_17_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_21_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_25_HOME=/opt/jdk/jdk-25.0.1+9
ENV JAVA_27_HOME=/opt/jdk27/jdk-27
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

Interesting! The log shows it's still detecting JDK 17.0.18 even though I set JAVA_HOME to JDK 21. This means the Gradle daemon is still using the old Java home. This could be because:

1. The Docker image was built with cached layers, so the JAVA_HOME environment variable change didn't take effect
2. Or the JAVA_HOME in Dockerfile is being overridden somehow

Let me rebuild the Docker image without caching to ensure the environment variables are correctly set.
